name: Tempo - Back to Turboblasting it!
description:
🏁"And remember: speed has NEVER killed anyone. Suddenly becoming stationary, that's what gets you."🏁

It's the bunny season. While everyone else makes bunnies, I make robo bunnies.

Robo racing bunnies.

Robo racing bunnies with huge buns.

Art by BlueRuchka. Project Turboblast by Pandamonium.
creator: Eggscellent
